headlines.headline: Crevex Labs reports record quarterly revenue, up 25% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 25% indicates strong operational performance and market demand.

headlines.headline: Crevex Labs sees mixed results in supply chain optimization pilot program

headlines.headline: Crevex Labs secures $400M contract with a national infrastructure agency

headlines.headline: Talvep Computing opens new office in Scandinavia

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office is a standard expansion move with limited immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
